race.description: Mach Energy Country Boosted Mdn Plate
race.comment: FLIRTATION (7) produced a solid effort on debut when she stalked the speed in tougher company for a narrow second over 1000m at Scone. Can overcome the awkward draw and put these away. LINDA'S PRINCESS (8) resuming and assess on her good second over 1350m at Beaumont Newcastle last December. Ran fifth in a recent 1000m trial here. Likely to get back early and savage the line. Each way. SUPIDO STAR (11) sharp improver second-up when she motored late for a close-up second over 1000m at Quirindi. Ready to peak and adept in all conditions. BEES KNEES (5) Super One filly out of Mojito on debut for the Wayne Wilkes yard. Finished third here in a 800m trial. Keep safe.
